title: Add mock claim extraction (Golden Test 2)
problem: Sources and chunks are persisted but claims are not extracted. Golden Test 2 requires research extract-claims to produce atomic scoped claims from ingested sources using the mock LLM client, with validation staging accepted/rejected claims in the reconciled claims table.
evidence: docs/agents/00_GOLDEN_TESTS.md Test 2: claim extraction produces atomic, scoped claims.
acceptance_criteria: research extract-claims --source <source_id> extracts scoped claims from an ingested fixture source.
Accepted claims include claim_text, source_id, chunk_id, scope, evidence_type, domain, and a primary quote span in claim_quotes.
Overgeneralized claims are rejected with machine-readable rejection reasons.
Claims without quote spans are rejected per Golden Test 3 patterns.
non_goals: Do not call Ollama or require a running model server.
Do not implement concept linking, relationships, or scoring.
Do not touch public export or public routes.
rollback_plan: Revert the ticket branch; delete any claims/claim_quotes rows created during manual testing from the local SQLite file.
